sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77126" key="pamprasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παμ-πρᾱσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n77126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unreserved sale of property</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.196</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
